content:
Short title and commencement
1. (1) This Act may be cited as the Capitation Grant Act 2002.
(2) This Act shall be deemed to have come into operation on
1 January 2002.
6
Laws of Malaysia
ACT 622
Amendment of Part I of the Tenth Schedule to the Federal
Constitution
2.
Subsection 1(1) of Part I of the Tenth Schedule to the Federal
Constitution is amended by substituting for paragraphs (a), (b), (c)
and (d) the following paragraphs:
“(a) for the first 100,000 persons at the rate of RM72.00 per
person;
(b) for the next 500,000 persons at the rate of RM10.20 per
person;
(c) for the next 500,000 persons at the rate RM10.80 per
person;
(d) for the remainder at the rate of RM11.40 per person,”.
7
Capitation Grant
LAWS OF MALAYSIA
Act 622
CAPITATION GRANT ACT 2002
